title: cotoneaster buxifolius var. lanatus
intro: Cotoneaster buxifolius var. lanatus is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its thorny stems and woolly, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cotoneaster buxifolius var. lanatus include treating various ailments such as colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as supporting immune function and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in moderation due to the potential risk of allergic reactions or interactions with other medications.
